reviews.review_description: nice vr guied video tour , beautiful house, beautiful place , bery good

developer_response.body: Thanks for checking it out and glad you liked it! More coming your way soon so be sure to get your hands on them.

reviews.review_title: I mean, she's a NICE house.
reviews.review_description: Brilliant? Maybe if it was closer to the sky. Oh wait, it says 'Brillhart' house!

developer_response.body: Thank you. Glad you liked it! We work hard to get the most out of the technology. Hope you'll check in on our future projects.

reviews.review_description: I hope you get some of the Fank Loyd Wright houses in here

developer_response.body: So do we! If you check out the DBOX or DBOXVR Facebook page you'll be the first to know if we do.

reviews.review_title: About 300MB to see a boring house.
reviews.review_description: To big file size and to little excitement.  There exist much smaller app to see much more exciting houses in VR elsewhere. Perhaps you should ask them to add your house among theirs or ask them to teach you how to make smaller file sizes...

developer_response.body: We are sorry you didn't enjoy the experience. We aim to give the highest quality possible and also an insight into the minds that created it. We'll continue to work on the technical side to reduce the file size but only if the quality isn't comprised. Thanks for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: The app has good imagery, with sharp 3D 360 pictures all the way. But for now they're showcasing only one house. And quite frankly, from the architecture and interior design perspectives, not to my taste.

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking a look. This is the first in a series we will updating periodically. We can tell you the next few are big projects from extremely renowned architects. Hopefully they are more to your tastes! Be sure to follow DBOXVR's Facebook page for updates and teasers on up and coming projects.
